expected_behavior: scan-graph.sh emits [PLUGIN-DISABLED] for parked-plugin (installed at user scope, absent from settings.json#enabledPlugins) and NOT for active-plugin (which is enabled).

The enable-state check is independent of installPath; the stub installPaths in this fixture also yield [PLUGIN-BROKEN-REF] (fixtures cannot carry a machine-portable absolute installPath, same as the plugin-broken-ref fixture) — that is expected and orthogonal to what this case asserts.
